message:
feat(pager): add S3-FIFO vs LRU vs ARC benchmark test harness

Add a comprehensive benchmark test module to the S3-FIFO cache
implementation with workload generators, hit rate tracking, and
comparison infrastructure:

- Define WorkloadKind enum with 4 synthetic workload patterns:
  sequential scan, Zipfian random, mixed interleaved, and scan
  pollution (Zipfian hot set + periodic full scans)
- Add AccessOutcome and CacheStats structs for fine-grained hit/miss
  breakdown including compulsory, capacity, and conflict misses
- Track eviction overhead, metadata operations, adaptation changes,
  and convergence timing
- Support configurable buffer pool sizes (10%, 25%, 50%, 75% of
  database size) for testing all pressure levels

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
